title: /Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/.claude 内容を表示せよ
summary_text: - **Core layers:** Thin global router in [AGENTS.md](/Users/masayuki/AGENTS.md) routes launcher identity, with orchestrator adapters in [CODEX.md](/Users/masayuki/.claude/CODEX.md) and [CLAUDE.md](/Users/masayuki/.claude/CLAUDE.md), and state contract in [PROJECT-OS.md](/Users/masayuki/.claude/docs/PROJECT-OS.md). - **Control boundaries:** `FUGUE` (Claude-led) and `Kernel` (Codex-led) are peer systems with explicit domain gates (`/fugue` blocked in Codex, `/kernel` blocked in Claude) and no auto-substitution across launchers. - **State surfaces:** Operational continuity is split between shared memory docs and Project OS ticket/artifact surfaces; bounded Kernel completion records now carry `ticket_id + normalized acceptance_text + acceptance_hash + authority_scope` in [task_backup.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-kernel-guard/src/codex_kernel_guard/task_backup.py). - **Verification model:** Guardrails are enforced at producer and workflow layers, with repo-side envelope re-verification in [reverify-kernel-task-completion-envelope.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/local/reverify-kernel-task-completion-envelope.py), wired by [kernel-task-completion-backup.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/kernel-task-completion-backup.yml), and covered by unit/smoke checks in [test_task_backup.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-kernel-guard/tests/test_task_backup.py) and [test-kernel-task-completion-backup.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/tests/test-kernel-task-completion-backup.sh). - **Biggest remaining boundary:** System correctness is locally hardened, but end-to-end live validation of dispatch/mirror flow (real GitHub path) and full FUGUE-side runtime verification remains an operational step, not yet part of this closed local proof.
